changes: Menu bar redesign: clear status header, file type icons, per-task progress
Fix file scanning: skipDescendants only for hidden directories (was skipping entire folders)
Fix tree endpoint 500 for non-admin users (owner_id alias bug)
Adaptive block size: 4-64 MB based on file size (16x fewer API calls for large files)
Activity logging: uploads, downloads, logins tracked in Activity Log
Real-time Recently Changed with task name and clickable files
Dashboard shows actual disk space instead of NaN
Fix bookmark directory creation on clean install
Fix check-hashes crash with 33K+ files (SQLite variable limit)
Move FileProvider credentials to UserDefaults (no keychain prompt on updates)
Request timeout increased to 300s for large block uploads
Accept empty files (Icon files) in from-blocks endpoint
On-demand bulk upload: app scans CloudStorage and uploads missing files via block upload
Robust JSON decoder for FileProvider: handles Int/String type mismatches, unblocks on-demand uploads
Block root-level file creation for non-admins, clean root, auto-expand user folder in browser
FileProvider: always use block upload, fix 500 errors on multipart upload
Fix FileProvider JSON decode: optional fields, removedLocally bool, menu bar icon shows on-demand activity
FileProvider block upload: no temp files, direct to server, dedup, real progress per block
Fix on-demand progress: show real network speed, not local disk speed; show transfer graph during on-demand
On-demand progress: 0.5s polling, live speed, bytes transferred, speed history graph
Show FileProvider on-demand upload/download progress in menu bar
Fix on-demand large file upload: streaming from disk instead of loading into memory
Fix password reset flow: token invalidation, base_url in reset link, sidebar hidden on public pages
Beautiful HTML email templates with branded layout
Fix SMTP TLS for port 465, forgot password sidebar fix, integration tests
Memory and CPU optimizations: streaming storage reads, request body limits, timer cleanup, reduced timeouts
File locking (30min auto-expire), SSE push notifications, all features verified
Fix on-demand: cloud-only file states, domain re-registration, eviction support
On-demand: remove local folder picker, auto CloudStorage path, monitored paths sync

Conflict detection, file search, preview modal, activity feed, Finder Sync Extension prep
Fix FileProvider: add GET /api/files/{id} endpoint, fix getFile 404 error

Settings window focus fix, remove LAN/external URL fields, auto-test server, auto re-auth after sleep
Atomic rename sync, change journal baseline fix, multi-client two-way sync
Change journal for correct rename/delete sync, two-way directory sync, periodic remote change detection
Sync wizard with remote folder browser, auto-detect LAN/extern, bandwidth limiter, selective sync, progress tracking fix, speed graph, theme toggle
Streaming downloads, Docker Desktop migration, upload/download icons fix
